mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, i.id AS instanceId, i.name, i.business_type AS businessType, i.business_key AS businessKey, i.status, u.name AS assigneeName, DATE_FORMAT(d.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, DATE_FORMAT(d.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS endTime FROM sea_node_detail d INNER JOIN sea_node n ON n.id = d.node_id INNER JOIN sea_instance i ON i.id = n.instance_id LEFT JOIN sys_account u ON u.id = i.user_id
d.status = 0 AND n.status = 0 AND d.company_id = #{companyId} AND d.assignee = #{userId}
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND FIND_IN_SET(i.status, #{statusStr})
AND FIND_IN_SET(i.business_type, #{businessTypeStr})
ORDER BY d.create_time DESC, d.id DESC

SELECT d.id, i.id AS instanceId, i.name, i.business_type AS businessType, i.business_key AS businessKey, i.status, u.name AS assigneeName, DATE_FORMAT(d.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, DATE_FORMAT(d.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS endTime FROM sea_node_detail d INNER JOIN sea_node n ON n.id = d.node_id INNER JOIN sea_instance i ON i.id = n.instance_id LEFT JOIN sys_account u ON u.id = i.user_id
n.type = 4 AND d.status = 3 AND d.company_id = #{companyId} AND d.assignee = #{userId}
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND FIND_IN_SET(i.business_type, #{businessTypeStr})
ORDER BY d.create_time DESC, d.id DESC

SELECT i.id, i.name, i.business_type AS businessType, i.business_key AS businessKey, i.status, DATE_FORMAT(i.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime FROM sea_instance i
i.company_id = #{companyId} AND i.user_id = #{userId}
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND FIND_IN_SET(i.business_type, #{businessTypeStr})
ORDER BY i.create_time DESC, i.id DESC

SELECT id, title AS name, business_type AS businessType, business_key AS businessKey, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime FROM sys_message
type = 1 AND company_id = #{companyId} AND to_user_id = #{userId}
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND FIND_IN_SET(business_type, #{businessTypeStr})
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
